mnemonics: WATERMARKING is like a SECRET INK STAMP: It invisibly Marks (WATERMARK) your digital property (data) to prove Ownership (INTEGRITY) and track its Source (AUTHENTICITY) if it's leaked.
keyPoints: Watermarking embeds a unique, imperceptible identifier into digital data to prove ownership.
It is used for copyright protection, traitor tracing, and tamper detection.
Robust watermarks are designed to survive common transformations like compression or cropping.
commonMistakes: Confusing watermarking with encryption (watermarking doesn't prevent access, it identifies ownership).
Assuming all watermarks are robust and will survive any attack or file alteration.
